title: Kumbhalgarh x Jawai
description: A short Rajasthan escape that blends heritage, nature, and wildlife with a Kumbhalgarh fort visit, a Ranakpur stop, and an evening Jawai leopard safari.
about: Kumbhalgarh x Jawai is a compact 2N/3D Rajasthan journey built around a heritage-and-wildlife route from Ahmedabad. The itinerary PDF shows an early-morning Kumbhalgarh check-in, fort visit, folk evening, a Day 2 drive via Ranakpur Jain Temple, and an evening Jawai leopard safari before the return to Ahmedabad.
bestFor: Weekend travelers looking for a short getaway
Travelers who enjoy heritage forts and scenic drives
Friends, couples, and small groups from Ahmedabad
highlights: Visit to Kumbhalgarh Fort, home to one of the world's longest fort walls
Ranakpur Jain Temple stop on the Jawai route
Evening Jawai leopard safari included in the trip flow
6 meals included: 2 breakfasts, 2 lunches, and 2 dinners
Traditional folk dance and DJ night at the Kumbhalgarh stay

itinerary.title: Departure from Ahmedabad
itinerary.description: Board from Ahmedabad and travel overnight toward Kumbhalgarh for the start of the trip.

itinerary.title: Kumbhalgarh exploration
itinerary.description: Reach Kumbhalgarh early morning, check in, enjoy breakfast and leisure time, visit Kumbhalgarh Fort after lunch, then return for a folk dance, DJ night, dinner, and overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Ranakpur and Jawai safari
itinerary.description: Travel toward Jawai via Ranakpur Jain Temple, take a lunch break on the way, and head for an evening Jawai leopard safari before beginning the return.

itinerary.title: Arrival back in Ahmedabad
itinerary.description: Reach Ahmedabad early morning with buffer time for onward plans.

inclusions: Comfortable AC bus travel from Ahmedabad to Jawai and return
4x4 jeep transfer from the stay to Kumbhalgarh Fort and return
6 meals in total: 2 breakfasts, 2 lunches, and 2 dinners
Stay as per the package occupancy plan
Jawai leopard safari as part of the itinerary flow
exclusions: Alcohol, mineral water, and food or beverages not included in the package
Extra refreshments and personal purchases during the trip
Entry fees or add-ons not explicitly mentioned in inclusions
Anything not mentioned in the itinerary inclusions

faqs.question: Where does this trip start from?
faqs.answer: The itinerary PDF lists Ahmedabad as the departure point for this trip.

faqs.question: Are meals included?
faqs.answer: Yes. The PDF lists 6 meals in total: 2 breakfasts, 2 lunches, and 2 dinners.

faqs.question: Is the Jawai leopard safari part of the route?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Day 2 itinerary specifically includes the Jawai leopard safari.

faqs.question: What is the stay setup for quad sharing?
faqs.answer: The PDF notes that quad sharing may be arranged with two extra mattresses instead of four separate beds.
